shorts.title: State officials warning: eyes up, phones down
shorts.title_distilled: State officials warning: eyes up, phones down.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — Starting Friday, drivers can be fined under Paul Miller's Law, named for a Scranton man killed by a distracted driver in Monroe County. The law targets drivers holding or using a hand-held device behind the wheel, even while stopped in traffic. PennDOT says distracted driving killed 54 people on Pennsylvania roads last year. [...]
shorts.content: (WBRE/WYOU) — Starting Friday, drivers can be fined under Paul Miller's Law, named for a Scranton man killed by a distracted driver in Monroe County. The law targets drivers holding or using a hand-held device behind the wheel, even while stopped in traffic. PennDOT says distracted driving killed 54 people on Pennsylvania roads last year. [...]

shorts.title: Electrical load transport expected to cause traffic delays
shorts.title_distilled: Electrical load transport expected to cause traffic delays.
shorts.description: DICKSON CITY, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A heads-up for drivers traveling through Dickson City Wednesday morning: Police say the move of an electrical transport is expected to cause traffic headaches. Dickson City Police announced on Facebook Tuesday night that a large electrical load is planned to be transported from the railroad tracks on Boulevard Avenue [...]
